texto: I do not have money to invest nor i have studied finance to be an investment banker but i would like to be an investor in the society
autor: by investing my love care and compassion in my children i think there will be a bank of bankable people
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a by investing my love care and compassion in my children i think there will be a bank of bankable people: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao.
